ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Zoe's rocking her retro fit but always ready to log back into the Mainframe. Complete Quests to earn V-Bucks with the Mainframe Throwback Quest Pack.</>

<text color="FFFD43FF">Includes:</>
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">Zoe's rocking her retro fit but always ready to log back into the Mainframe. Complete Quests to earn V-Bucks with the Mainframe Throwback Quest Pack.</>

<text color="FFFD43FF">Includes:</>

DisclaimerText.SourceString: <text color="FFFD43FF">V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items like Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, Wraps and the latest season's Battle Pass! Gliders and Contrails may not be used in Save the World mode.</>
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString: <text color="FFFD43FF">V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items like Outfits, Gliders, Pickaxes, Emotes, Wraps and the latest season's Battle Pass! Gliders and Contrails may not be used in Save the World mode.</>

Name.SourceString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Mainframe Throwback Quest Bundle:</> Unlock up to 1,000 V-Bucks as you complete quests!
Name.LocalizedString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Mainframe Throwback Quest Bundle:</> Unlock up to 1,000 V-Bucks as you complete quests!
